query: WITH RECURSIVE descendants(id, depth, block_type) AS ( SELECT b.id, 0, b.block_type FROM blocks b WHERE b.parent_id = ?1 AND b.deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT b.id, d.depth + 1, b.block_type FROM blocks b JOIN descendants d ON b.parent_id = d.id WHERE b.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.depth < 100 AND d.block_type != 'page' ) UPDATE blocks SET space_id = ( SELECT p.space_id FROM blocks p WHERE p.id = blocks.page_id ) WHERE (id = ?1 OR id IN (SELECT id FROM descendants)) AND block_type != 'page' AND page_id IS NOT NULL
